00030 #ifndef _STDLIB_H_
00031 #define _STDLIB_H_
00032 
00033 #include <kern/types.h>
00034 #include <types/size_t.h>
00035 #include <sys/null.h>
00036 
00037 /*
00038  * Ascii to integer - turn a string holding a number into a number.
00039  */
00040 int atoi(const char *);
00041 
00042 /*
00043  * Standard routine to bail out of a program in a severe error condition.
00044  */
00045 void abort(void);
00046 
00047 /*
00048  * Routine to exit cleanly.
00049  * (This does libc cleanup before calling the _exit system call.)
00050  */
00051 void exit(int code);
00052 
00053 /*
00054  * Run a command. Returns its exit status as it comes back from waitpid().
00055  */
00056 int system(const char *command);
00057 
00058 /*
00059  * Pseudo-random number generator.
00060  */
00061 #define RAND_MAX  0x7fffffff
00062 long random(void);
00063 void srandom(unsigned long seed);
00064 char *initstate(unsigned long, char *, size_t);
00065 char *setstate(char *);
00066 
00067 /*
00068  * Memory allocation functions.
00069  */
00070 void *malloc(size_t size);
00071 void free(void *ptr);
00072 
00073 #endif /* _STDLIB_H_ */
